title: GetState
text: GetState Retrieves information to the USTATE table. "USYSSTAT".GetState ( SesstionId , $instancename , SessionData ) Table 1. Parameters Parameter Type Direction Value SesstionId string IN Generated by Uniface, and accessible using $webinfo("WEBSERVERCONTEXT"), SESSION . $instancename string IN Name of the server page component instance, returned by $instancename . SessionData string OUT Uniface list of state information. Returns Uniface list of state information. Example: GetState The default code of the preActivate trigger of dynamic and static server pages activates the GetState operation and use the information returned in SessionData to set component variables to restore the server page state: Explain this code trigger preActivate variables string WebServerContext, Session, UserContext endvariables WebServerContext = $webinfo("WEBSERVERCONTEXT") getitem/id Session, WebServerContext, "SESSION" UserContext = "" activate "USYSSTAT".GetState(Session, $instancename, UserContext) getlistitems/id /component UserContext end; preActivate Copy Related Links $webinfo ("WebServerContext") The WebServerContext topic contains an associative list of properties that provide state information about the Uniface Server and the context in which it is running. $instancename Return the name of the current component instance.
